emails.subject: Galveston / Port Art/Revision one
emails.body: Galveston Port Art/Revision one Opps, see revisied price. Dan we need to admend the Galveston Port Art contract to reflect the following price changes from IF adder to fixed price adder) Date Volume Price Jul 01 Oct 01 525 a day $5.20 plus adder Nov 01 875 a day $5.27 plus adder Dec 01 Feb 02 1,800 a day $5.33 plus adder Mar 02 Jun 02 525 a day $4.53 plus adder Forwarded by Janet H Wallis/HOU/ECT on 04/03/2001 09:04 PM Janet H Wallis 04/03/2001 08:50 AM

emails.body: Galveston Port Art/Revision one Opps, see revisied price. Dan we need to admend the Galveston Port Art contract to reflect the following price changes from IF adder to fixed price adder) Date Volume Price Jul 01 Oct 01 525 a day $5.20 plus adder Nov 01 875 a day $5.27 plus adder Dec 01 Feb 02 1,800 a day $5.33 plus adder Mar 02 Jun 02 525 a day $4.53 plus adder Forwarded by Janet H Wallis/HOU/ECT on 04/03/2001 09:04 PM Janet H Wallis 04/03/2001 08:50 AM

emails.subject: Re: Galveston / Port Art/Revision one
emails.body: Re: Galveston Port Art/Revision one Janet, Please review the attached amendment to see if it sets forth your understanding of the pricing to be applicable with regard to the first volumes to be delivered during the July June time period. I assume you want the prices to revert to Index after this period. Please advise, If okay, please forward to Pat Anderson. Janet H Wallis 04/03/2001 09:07 AM

emails.subject: Re: Galveston / Port Art/Revision one
emails.body: Re: Galveston Port Art/Revision one Janet, Please review the attached amendment to see if it sets forth your understanding of the pricing to be applicable with regard to the first volumes to be delivered during the July June time period. I assume you want the prices to revert to Index after this period. Please advise, If okay, please forward to Pat Anderson. Janet H Wallis 04/03/2001 09:07 AM
